name: Favicon Generator
description: Generate favicon sizes from one image.
title: Favicon Generator
roundnessSquareHelp: The square shape does not apply roundness.
roundnessWithBackgroundHelp: Rounds the generated background and the final icon crop.
roundnessWithoutBackgroundHelp: Without generated background it only clips the image; visible when the PNG/SVG already has fill.
darkDropHint: Drag the dark icon here or use file picker
dropHint: Drag and drop an image here or use file picker
empty: Upload an image to generate sizes.
technicalFilesDescription: Open only the code you need to copy or download.
downloadPackageHint: Includes every icon and integration file.
previewEmpty: Choose an image to preview your favicon in browser tabs.
processingDescription: Creating sizes, PWA variants, and package files.
generationError: The package could not be generated. Check the image and try again.

installation.title: Install and verify
installation.description: Choose your technology and get exact instructions, an AI-ready prompt, and a final check.
installation.aiDescription: A self-contained prompt for an agent to inspect the project, install the package, and verify the result.
installation.checkerDescription: Analyze public HTML and confirm browser icons, Apple Touch Icon, and manifest are available.
installation.checkSuccess: The installation is complete and accessible.
installation.checkPartial: The installation is incomplete. Review the marked items.
installation.checkError: That public URL could not be checked.

fileErrors.too-large: The image exceeds the 20 MB limit.
fileErrors.unsupported-type: The file is not a valid PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, BMP, or SVG image.
fileErrors.unsafe-svg: The SVG contains disallowed scripts, events, or external resources.
fileErrors.invalid-image: The image is damaged or cannot be decoded by this browser.
fileErrors.dimensions-too-large: The image exceeds 8192 px or 40 megapixels. Reduce its dimensions.

guided.sourceDescription: Upload the source icon. You can also add a dedicated variant for dark backgrounds.
guided.identityDescription: Set names, path, and global appearance before adjusting each platform.
guided.browserDescription: Check the favicon in light and dark tabs.
guided.appleDescription: Review the icon on the iPhone home screen and customize its rendering when needed.
guided.androidDescription: Review the icon on Pixel and adapt shape, scale, or color for Android.
guided.exportDescription: Generate the final package, review its files, and download the ZIP or individual resources.
